---
title: "Special Characters Test"
---

## Slide with backslashes

::: {.editable}
Backslash in code: `"\\d"` and `rename_all(\(x))`

Explicit trailing spaces:\ \

LaTeX inline: $x = \frac{a}{b}$
:::

## Slide with equation

::: {.editable}
$$
x^* = \left\{
    \begin{array}{ll}
      \dfrac{x^\lambda - 1}{\lambda {x}^{\lambda - 1}}, & \lambda \neq 0 \\
      {x} \log x & \lambda = 0
    \end{array}
  \right.
$$
:::
